title: Example 8-6 bolted and riveted joints loaded in shear

notes: Example 8-6 style input. The problem statement data are kept in the JSON input.
Member properties are fetched from table_a_20.csv using SAE/AISI 1018 and the cold-drawn processing route.
Bolt proof, yield, and tensile strengths are fetched from table_8_9.csv. The thread minor area route uses table_8_2.csv.
